definition:
1. to card  or comb well: to tear in pieces, rend in shreds , (Euripides); καταξαίνειν τινὰ εἰς φοινικίδα to pound him  to red rags, (Aristophanes Comicus):—;Pass., καταξανθείς crushed to atoms , (Sophocles Tragicus); πρὶν κατεξάνθαι (Euripides) 
2. to wear  or waste away , Lat. atterere, (Aeschulus Tragicus): Pass., κατεξάνθην πόνοις, δακρύοις (Euripides) (ML)
